title: Eight from Malappuram feared dead in accident in Valparai
content: At least eight people from Kerala were killed in a road accident at Valparai on Friday after a mini van plunged off the road near hairpin bend 13. A total of 16 people, including children, were travelling in the vehicle. Most of them were teachers from a school in Malappuram. The group was reportedly returning from Pollachi when the accident happened around 4 pm. According to preliminary information, the vehicle lost control and fell from hairpin bend 13 to hairpin bend 11. The injured were rushed to hospitals in Pollachi. (To be updated)
